g.title: XDRV
g.text: 18-50 VDC. Signal side common-anode: PUL+/DIR+/ENBL+ jumpered together to the 5 V wire; Mega pulls PUL-/DIR-/ENBL-. EN active-LOW; right = LOW, left = HIGH. [confirm jumpering; DIP microstep/current TBD]

g.title: YDRV
g.text: 18-50 VDC. Common-anode as XDRV. EN active-LOW; up = LOW, down = HIGH. [confirm jumpering; DIP microstep/current TBD]

g.title: PSU
g.text: AC 110/220 V in; DC out 24 V / 15 A (360 W). Feeds both driver DC buses.

g.title: MOTOR_X
g.text: drives the camera carriage. [model / rated current TBD; verify coil pairing]

g.title: MOTOR_Y
g.text: GT2 belt drive. [model / rated current TBD; verify coil pairing]

g.title: PIX_H
g.text: INPUT_PULLUP; OUT reads LOW when the slot is blocked

g.title: PIX_V
g.text: INPUT_PULLUP; OUT reads LOW when the slot is blocked

g.title: CAM
g.text: ~50 ms HIGH pulse fires capture (shorter is ignored)

g.title: RELAYS
g.text: active-LOW; IN1 = shelf 1 … IN6 = shelf 6. Coil supply (JD-VCC) external — see TODO.
